DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear.comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear.comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions /u events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

LIN_IN.Info_Aux_IN.comment: status of auxiliary audio on fascia

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

lists.4: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Status mask.comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

ANT1.Frequency value.comment: Antenna1 Frequency Tune $xxxx  [KHz], 1KHz step if AM ex : 585 KHz -> $20 20 35 38 35

CANM.RefMessagerie.comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

VIN.comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

LIN_IN.Info_Aux_IN_2.comment: status of auxiliary audio on fascia

lists.2: Present with front and rear AAP

ANT2.Frequency value.comment: Antenna2 Frequency value $xxxx, [MHz], 0.1MHz step if FM ex : 100.3 MHz -> $20 31 30 30 33

CANV.RefMessagerie.comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

lists.2: Easy access for driver and passenger

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)
